ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-05-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE FEB-05-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS DAISO CALIFORNIA, L L C AND DAISO HOLDING U S A, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED; DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN A SUFFICIENT EXCUSE FOR FAILURE TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT NOR HAS DEFENDANT SHOWN REASONABLE DILIGENCE ONCE IT RECEIVED THE REQUEST FOR DEFAULT, OR EVEN ONCE SOMEONE REALIZED WHAT WAS GOING ON. THEREFORE DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN EXTRINSIC MISTAKE SUFFICIENT TO AVOID THE STATUTORY TIME LIMITS. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
